primary_sources.name: Medicare Claims Processing Manual
primary_sources.relevance: Defines CPT, ICD-10, and prior authorization requirements for nephrology services

primary_sources.name: ICD-10-CM Official Guidelines for Coding and Reporting
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative source for ICD-10 coding definitions and nephrology-specific codes

primary_sources.name: CPT Professional Edition
primary_sources.relevance: Official definitions of Current Procedural Terminology codes for nephrology procedures

primary_sources.name: Value-Based Care Quality Payment Program Guidelines
primary_sources.relevance: Defines value-based care metrics and payment models for nephrology practices

secondary_sources.name: Revenue Cycle Management Best Practices for Nephrology
secondary_sources.relevance: Professional guidance on RCM terminology and processes specific to nephrology

gaps: Limited nephrology-specific RCM terminology resources from authoritative medical organizations
